# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def convert_image
    uploaded_image = params[:image]
    format = params[:format]
    size = params[:size]

    convert_command = "convert #{uploaded_image.tempfile.path} -resize #{size} #{uploaded_image.tempfile.path.chomp(File.extname(uploaded_image.tempfile.path))}.#{format}"
    system(convert_command)

    render json: { message: "Image converted successfully" }
  end
end
